_barrier_note: Asymmetric ATR Triple Barrier from the momentum-direction entry: TP = TB_ATR_TP*ATR14, SL = TB_ATR_SL*ATR14. Reward:risk b = TB_ATR_TP/TB_ATR_SL feeds the generalized Kelly f=clip(lambda*(p-(1-p)/b),0,cap). TB_ATR_TP==TB_ATR_SL reproduces the symmetric v1 label (b=1 => f=2p-1) byte-for-byte.

ENTRY_GATE._note: Meta-labeling PRIMARY filter — a fixed, Train-only, causal (features at t0) rule that keeps only significant-move setups so the XGBoost secondary is not flooded with noise: |log_return_5| >= vol_floor_k * realized_volatility_20 (1h features). enabled=false reproduces the original every-bar candidate set. NOT per-asset tuned.

_optuna_objective_note: L7 now selects XGBoost hyper-params by mean Train OOF trading LOG-GROWTH (deployed engine over HPO_OP_GRID), aligning Optuna with STRATEGY_OBJECTIVE.primary=profit_factor_max instead of the old ranking metric auc_pr. The fine (theta,lambda) point is chosen at L8 calibrate_kelly; cv_auc_pr is reported only.
_op_calibration_note: L8 calibrates the operating point (entry threshold theta, Kelly fraction lambda) JOINTLY on Train OOF log-growth via the calibrate_kelly grid. theta is HELD at a single conservative value [0.60]: calibrating theta over the wider grid over-fit the operating point (it chose a lower theta that traded far more on Train but generalized to a WORSE OOS profit factor, e.g. AAPL 1.89 -> 0.99), so theta is fixed while lambda is still calibrated. The joint (theta,lambda) machinery stays config-driven for future use; widen this grid to re-enable per-asset theta.
